purpose: Architecture ratchets for Auth independence (ADR-0011 / AUTH-INDEPENDENCE-GATE). Ceilings turn one way: a PR that lowers a measured count must lower the ceiling in the same change; raising a ceiling requires an explicit justification in the PR.

auth_forbidden_imports.description: Auth package must not import root monolith modules (store, auth, notify, app_impl, mcp_server, mcp_server_impl).

store_import_files_src.description: Files under src/ that contain `import store` or `from store ...`. Hard ceiling; prefer decreasing.

wildcard_import_sites_src.description: AST ImportFrom sites under src/ that import `*`. No new wildcard imports.

untyped_body_dict_routers.description: Router lines matching `body: dict = Body(...)`. Auth package must stay at 0; overall ceiling must not grow.

ruff.description: On changed .py files vs merge-base (or listed paths), `ruff check` must exit 0 when ruff is installed.
